entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Workflow Trigger Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE WorkflowLaunch PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <WorkflowLaunch status="failed" workflowName="Leaver WorkFlow On EndDate" workflowRef="Leaver WorkFlow On EndDate"> <Messages> <Message key="Undefined argument: identityName : at Line: 4 " type="Error"/> </Messages> <Variables> <Map> <entry key="identityName" value="Muthaih Muralidharan"/> </Map> </Variables> <WorkflowCaseRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.WorkflowCase" name="Leaver WorkFlow On EndDate"/> </WorkflowCaseRef> </WorkflowLaunch>
